source_url_from_user_input: <url not provided in candidate index; must be supplied by human before Phase 6C>
clone_command_template: DO NOT RUN - TEMPLATE ONLY: git clone --depth 1 <source_url_from_user_input> skills-inbox/quarantine/Understand-Anything/repo/
static_review_checklist: Verify directory structure matches expected skill format
Check for install scripts (setup.sh, postinstall.js, etc.)
Check for network access patterns (fetch, curl, http requests)
Check for filesystem write operations outside own directory
Check for credential or secret handling
required_human_gate_before_clone: Source URL provided by human reviewer
allowlist.draft.json entry verified against provided URL
Quarantine directory created and permissions verified (read-only for agent)
rollback_cleanup_policy: If plan is rejected or deferred: archive plan file to skills-inbox/source-lock-plans/archive/. Quarantine directory (if created in Phase 6C) must be deleted after static review completes or if rejected. No code from quarantine may persist outside quarantine.
